aweme_info.desc: Starting in December, all men between the ages of 18 and 25 will be automatically registered for the military draft. They will be added to the Selective Service System, the independent government agency that keeps a list of all eligible Americans. For decades, the majority of men would register themselves, or face a felony. Congress tucked the rule change into a bipartisan defense bill that President Donald Trump signed into law late last year. It comes as enrollment has slipped in recent years, even as concerns about conflicts with nations like China and Russia have grown. There has not been a military draft since the Vietnam War. #pbsnews #news #Congress #draft #military #unitedstates

original_client_text.markup_text:
Starting in December, all men between the ages of 18 and 25 will be automatically registered for the military draft.

They will be added to the Selective Service System, the independent government agency that keeps a list of all eligible Americans. For decades, the majority of men would register themselves, or face a felony.

Congress tucked the rule change into a bipartisan defense bill that President Donald Trump signed into law late last year. It comes as enrollment has slipped in recent years, even as concerns about conflicts with nations like China and Russia have grown.

There has not been a military draft since the Vietnam War. #pbsnews #news #Congress #draft #military #unitedstates

aweme_info.search_desc: ...military draft. They will be added to the Selective Service System, the independent government agency that keeps a list of all eligible Americans. For decades, the majority of men would register themselves, or face a felony. Congress tucked the rule change into a bipartisan defense bill that President Donald Trump signed into law late last year. It comes as enrollment has slipped in recent years, even as concerns about conflicts with nations like China and Russia have grown. There has not been a military draft since the Vietnam War. #pbsnews #news #Congress #draft #military #unitedstates

title.text: Automatic Selective Service registration (required of men 18-25 since 1980) will use federal databases starting Dec 2026 to improve compliance. This is an administrative update; no draft lottery or conscription is active or planned.

aweme_info.content_desc: ["may the odds be ever in your favour \ud83d\udfe5⬛️","","The Thai military conscription lottery, which determines whether eligible men must enter active military service, saw many anxious men awaiting their fate.","","Each man draws either a red or black card — red signals conscription, while black means exemption from military service.","","The lottery is held across the country each April, with this year’s running from Apr. 1 to 12.","","According to The Nation, those required to report this year include Thai men born in 2005, as well as those born between 1997 and 2004 who have never previously undergone military selection, or whose cases have not yet been completed.","","#mothershipnews #mothershipabroad "]
aweme_info.desc: may the odds be ever in your favour 🟥⬛️ The Thai military conscription lottery, which determines whether eligible men must enter active military service, saw many anxious men awaiting their fate. Each man draws either a red or black card — red signals conscription, while black means exemption from military service. The lottery is held across the country each April, with this year’s running from Apr. 1 to 12. According to The Nation, those required to report this year include Thai men born in 2005, as well as those born between 1997 and 2004 who have never previously undergone military selection, or whose cases have not yet been completed. #mothershipnews #mothershipabroad

original_client_text.markup_text:
may the odds be ever in your favour 🟥⬛️

The Thai military conscription lottery, which determines whether eligible men must enter active military service, saw many anxious men awaiting their fate.

Each man draws either a red or black card — red signals conscription, while black means exemption from military service.

The lottery is held across the country each April, with this year’s running from Apr. 1 to 12.

According to The Nation, those required to report this year include Thai men born in 2005, as well as those born between 1997 and 2004 who have never previously undergone military selection, or whose cases have not yet been completed.

#mothershipnews #mothershipabroad

aweme_info.search_desc: ...military conscription lottery, which determines whether eligible men must enter active military service, saw many anxious men awaiting their fate. Each man draws either a red or black card — red signals conscription, while black means exemption from military service. The lottery is held across the country each April, with this year’s running from Apr. 1 to 12. According to The Nation, those required to report this year include Thai men born in 2005, as well as those born between 1997 and 2004 who have never previously undergone military selection, or whose cases have not yet been completed. #mothershipnews #mothershipabroad

","","Ironisnya, Rich Starry dan pemiliknya, Shanghai Xuanrun Shipping Co Ltd, merupakan subjek sanksi AS atas dugaan transaksi perdagangan dengan Iran.","","Langkah berani kapal berawak warga negara China ini dilakukan saat CENTCOM mengerahkan kekuatan penuh di kawasan tersebut. aweme_info.desc: Sebuah kapal tanker asal China yang masuk dalam daftar sanksi Washington, dilaporkan berhasil menembus jalur krusial perdagangan dunia tersebut pada Selasa (14/4/2026). Berdasarkan data pelayaran dari LSEG, MarineTraffic, dan Kpler, kapal bernama Rich Starry itu menjadi armada pertama yang tercatat sukses melintasi selat dan keluar dari wilayah Teluk sejak blokade laut AS resmi diberlakukan. Kapal tanker berukuran menengah (medium-range) ini membawa sekitar 250.000 barel metanol yang dimuat dari Pelabuhan Hamriyah, Uni Emirat Arab.  Ironisnya, Rich Starry dan pemiliknya, Shanghai Xuanrun Shipping Co Ltd, merupakan subjek sanksi AS atas dugaan transaksi perdagangan dengan Iran. Langkah berani kapal berawak warga negara China ini dilakukan saat CENTCOM mengerahkan kekuatan penuh di kawasan tersebut.  - Selengkapnya kunjungi website dengan klik link di bio atau download aplikasi di AppStore dan Google Play Store. #InilahNews #RichStarry #KapalTanker #China #SelatHormuz

original_client_text.markup_text:
Sebuah kapal tanker asal China yang masuk dalam daftar sanksi Washington, dilaporkan berhasil menembus jalur krusial perdagangan dunia tersebut pada Selasa (14/4/2026).

Berdasarkan data pelayaran dari LSEG, MarineTraffic, dan Kpler, kapal bernama Rich Starry itu menjadi armada pertama yang tercatat sukses melintasi selat dan keluar dari wilayah Teluk sejak blokade laut AS resmi diberlakukan.

Kapal tanker berukuran menengah (medium-range) ini membawa sekitar 250.000 barel metanol yang dimuat dari Pelabuhan Hamriyah, Uni Emirat Arab.

Ironisnya, Rich Starry dan pemiliknya, Shanghai Xuanrun Shipping Co Ltd, merupakan subjek sanksi AS atas dugaan transaksi perdagangan dengan Iran.

Langkah berani kapal berawak warga negara China ini dilakukan saat CENTCOM mengerahkan kekuatan penuh di kawasan tersebut.
-
Selengkapnya kunjungi website dengan klik link di bio atau download aplikasi di AppStore dan Google Play Store.

#InilahNews #RichStarry #KapalTanker #China #SelatHormuz

aweme_info.search_desc: Sebuah kapal tanker asal China yang masuk dalam daftar sanksi Washington, dilaporkan berhasil menembus jalur krusial perdagangan dunia tersebut pada Selasa (14/4/2026).

original_client_text.markup_text:
Reports indicate that around 16 Xian Y-20 cargo aircraft have landed in Iran, raising fresh concerns about potential military coordination and the broader implications for global security.

As tensions continue to escalate, movements involving aircraft, weapons, and strategic support are being closely monitored worldwide—fueling fears that the situation is expanding beyond a regional conflict into a matter of international significance.

#Iran #China #Y20 #MilitaryNews #BreakingNews

aweme_info.content_desc: ["Chokepoints","","The media and critics of the Trump administration like to imagine that he and his administration are sort of wandering aimlessly through a minefield of foreign military engagements. Most recently, there have been a wave of articles and commentary suggesting that there is no plan associated with the conflict in Iran, but an announcement was made that didn't get a lot of media attention recently, and that was the announcement that the United States has struck a new defense partnership with Indonesia. Now, Indonesia sits on one side of the Strait of Malacca, so I started looking into it, and the Strait of Malacca is considered to be a military chokepoint, just like the Strait of Hormuz is a military chokepoint, just like the Panama Canal is a military chokepoint. The Strait of Malacca is particularly important because Roughly 90% of the crude oil imported by China, according to my sources, flows through the Strait of Malacca. In fact, the Strait of Malacca is so important to China that former Chinese President Hu Jintao coined the phrase the \"Malacca dilemma\" to describe just how reliant China is on that narrow waterway. So while the Trump administration's thinking may not be clearly communicate, it does seem like there's an idea behind their foreign military engagements. It also is clear that the Trump administration intends to invest in U.S. maritime capabilities and gaining leverage over these geostrategic chokepoints.","","##news##politics##trump##china"]
aweme_info.desc: Chokepoints The media and critics of the Trump administration like to imagine that he and his administration are sort of wandering aimlessly through a minefield of foreign military engagements. Most recently, there have been a wave of articles and commentary suggesting that there is no plan associated with the conflict in Iran, but an announcement was made that didn't get a lot of media attention recently, and that was the announcement that the United States has struck a new defense partnership with Indonesia. Now, Indonesia sits on one side of the Strait of Malacca, so I started looking into it, and the Strait of Malacca is considered to be a military chokepoint, just like the Strait of Hormuz is a military chokepoint, just like the Panama Canal is a military chokepoint. The Strait of Malacca is particularly important because Roughly 90% of the crude oil imported by China, according to my sources, flows through the Strait of Malacca. In fact, the Strait of Malacca is so important to China that former Chinese President Hu Jintao coined the phrase the "Malacca dilemma" to describe just how reliant China is on that narrow waterway. So while the Trump administration's thinking may not be clearly communicate, it does seem like there's an idea behind their foreign military engagements. It also is clear that the Trump administration intends to invest in U.S. maritime capabilities and gaining leverage over these geostrategic chokepoints. ##news##politics##trump##china

original_client_text.markup_text:
Chokepoints

The media and critics of the Trump administration like to imagine that he and his administration are sort of wandering aimlessly through a minefield of foreign military engagements. Most recently, there have been a wave of articles and commentary suggesting that there is no plan associated with the conflict in Iran, but an announcement was made that didn't get a lot of media attention recently, and that was the announcement that the United States has struck a new defense partnership with Indonesia. Now, Indonesia sits on one side of the Strait of Malacca, so I started looking into it, and the Strait of Malacca is considered to be a military chokepoint, just like the Strait of Hormuz is a military chokepoint, just like the Panama Canal is a military chokepoint. The Strait of Malacca is particularly important because Roughly 90% of the crude oil imported by China, according to my sources, flows through the Strait of Malacca. In fact, the Strait of Malacca is so important to China that former Chinese President Hu Jintao coined the phrase the "Malacca dilemma" to describe just how reliant China is on that narrow waterway. So while the Trump administration's thinking may not be clearly communicate, it does seem like there's an idea behind their foreign military engagements. It also is clear that the Trump administration intends to invest in U.S. maritime capabilities and gaining leverage over these geostrategic chokepoints.

##news##politics##trump##china

aweme_info.search_desc: ...military engagements. Most recently, there have been a wave of articles and commentary suggesting that there is no plan associated with the conflict in Iran, but an announcement was made that didn't get a lot of media attention recently, and that was the announcement that the United States has struck a new defense partnership with Indonesia. Now, Indonesia sits on one side of the Strait of Malacca, so I started looking into it, and the Strait of Malacca is considered to be a military chokepoint, just like the Strait of Hormuz is a military chokepoint, just like the Panama Canal is a military chokepoint. The Strait of Malacca is particularly important because Roughly 90% of the crude oil imported by China, according to my sources, flows through the Strait of Malacca. In fact, the Strait of Malacca is so important to China that former Chinese President Hu Jintao coined the phrase the "Malacca dilemma" to describe just how reliant China is on that narrow waterway. So while the Trump administration's thinking may not be clearly communicate, it does seem like there's an idea behind their foreign military engagements. It also is clear that the Trump administration intends to invest in U.S. maritime capabilities and gaining leverage over these geostrategic chokepoints. ##news##politics##trump##china

aweme_info.content_desc: ["Russia Just Gave Iran S-400 System - Every Israeli F-35","","Now Tracked in Real-Time.","","A major strategic shift has occurred as Russia delivers the S-400 air defense system to Iran - not the export version, but the full operational system Russia uses to protect Moscow. This delivery fundamentally changes Israeli air operations as every F-35 stealth aircraft can now be tracked in real-time from takeoff to landing. The S-400 operates on VHF and L-band radar frequencies that defeat F-35 stealth geometry. Unlike X-band radars the F-35 was designed to evade, these longer wavelengths reflect off the aircraft strongly enough for continuous tracking at ranges up to 400 kilometers. In this video we explain:","","How the S-400 delivery happened and what Russia included Why F-35 stealth doesn't work against VHF radar frequencies The real-time tracking capability that ends Israeli air superiority What this means for Israel's $5 billion F-35 investment The strategic message Russia is sending to China, India, and other countries","","Why there's no technological fix to counter this system","","Russian technicians are now integrating the S-400 into Iran's air defense network with satellite data feeds from Moscow. Israeli F-35s that were invisible six months ago are now tracked continuously the moment they become airborne. Watch the full analysis to understand how one weapons delivery just ended decades of Israeli air dominance.","","russia gave iran s400,s400 iran,s400 triumf, russia iran s400,f35 tracked, israel f35 iran, s400 vs f35,iran air defense, russia iran alliance, stealth aircraft radar,s400 missile system, israel iran war,middle east war,iran news today,russian military,iran defense system,f35 stealth fighter, air defense system, military technology, war and money report,geopolitics, military analysis, defense news,iran nuclear, russia iran deal, nato s400.","#russia ","#iran ","#unitedstates ","#israel "]
aweme_info.desc: Russia Just Gave Iran S-400 System - Every Israeli F-35 Now Tracked in Real-Time. A major strategic shift has occurred as Russia delivers the S-400 air defense system to Iran - not the export version, but the full operational system Russia uses to protect Moscow. This delivery fundamentally changes Israeli air operations as every F-35 stealth aircraft can now be tracked in real-time from takeoff to landing. The S-400 operates on VHF and L-band radar frequencies that defeat F-35 stealth geometry. Unlike X-band radars the F-35 was designed to evade, these longer wavelengths reflect off the aircraft strongly enough for continuous tracking at ranges up to 400 kilometers. In this video we explain: How the S-400 delivery happened and what Russia included Why F-35 stealth doesn't work against VHF radar frequencies The real-time tracking capability that ends Israeli air superiority What this means for Israel's $5 billion F-35 investment The strategic message Russia is sending to China, India, and other countries Why there's no technological fix to counter this system Russian technicians are now integrating the S-400 into Iran's air defense network with satellite data feeds from Moscow. Israeli F-35s that were invisible six months ago are now tracked continuously the moment they become airborne. Watch the full analysis to understand how one weapons delivery just ended decades of Israeli air dominance. russia gave iran s400,s400 iran,s400 triumf, russia iran s400,f35 tracked, israel f35 iran, s400 vs f35,iran air defense, russia iran alliance, stealth aircraft radar,s400 missile system, israel iran war,middle east war,iran news today,russian military,iran defense system,f35 stealth fighter, air defense system, military technology, war and money report,geopolitics, military analysis, defense news,iran nuclear, russia iran deal, nato s400. #russia  #iran  #unitedstates  #israel

0.text_info:
Russia Just Gave Iran S-400 System - Every Israeli F-35
Now Tracked in Real-Time.
A major strategic shift has occurred as Russia delivers the S-400 air defense system to Iran - not the export version, but the full operational system Russia uses to protect Moscow.

original_client_text.markup_text:
Russia Just Gave Iran S-400 System - Every Israeli F-35

Now Tracked in Real-Time.

A major strategic shift has occurred as Russia delivers the S-400 air defense system to Iran - not the export version, but the full operational system Russia uses to protect Moscow. This delivery fundamentally changes Israeli air operations as every F-35 stealth aircraft can now be tracked in real-time from takeoff to landing. The S-400 operates on VHF and L-band radar frequencies that defeat F-35 stealth geometry. Unlike X-band radars the F-35 was designed to evade, these longer wavelengths reflect off the aircraft strongly enough for continuous tracking at ranges up to 400 kilometers. In this video we explain:

How the S-400 delivery happened and what Russia included Why F-35 stealth doesn't work against VHF radar frequencies The real-time tracking capability that ends Israeli air superiority What this means for Israel's $5 billion F-35 investment The strategic message Russia is sending to China, India, and other countries

Why there's no technological fix to counter this system

Russian technicians are now integrating the S-400 into Iran's air defense network with satellite data feeds from Moscow. Israeli F-35s that were invisible six months ago are now tracked continuously the moment they become airborne. Watch the full analysis to understand how one weapons delivery just ended decades of Israeli air dominance.
